title: Balance Coin crashes 99% after reported $915K exploit
summary: The attack allowed the exploiter to liquidate multiple Bitcoin-backed vaults before swapping the assets for profit.

title: OpenAI says AI models escaped containment to hack Hugging Face
summary: OpenAI called it an “unprecedented cyber incident” after its AI models broke out of their sandbox to hack an AI startup during a security evaluation.

title: Japan 40-Year Bond Sale Sees Strongest Demand Since March 2025
summary: Japan’s 40-year government bond auction drew its strongest demand since March 2025 as investors were attracted to higher yields.

title: Stocks Advance as Chip Rally Builds, Brent Climbs: Markets Wrap
summary: Chip stocks extended a global rally as investors renewed bets that the artificial intelligence trade has further room to run. Oil climbed on pessimism over US-Iran peace talks.

title: Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Bitcoin is NOT Changed by Proof Of Node
The proposal to temporarily restrict arbitrary data in Bitcoin transactions lacks economic nodes, protocol developers, and hashrate. History from the 2017 UASF shows nodes succeed only with broad investor and developer weight behind them.

title: DAT Went Wrong: Satsuma to Unwind Bitcoin Treasury, Sell Off $43 Million in BTC
summary: The UK Bitcoin treasury company raised $218 million less than a year ago. Now it's returning whatever is left.

title: OpenAI Models Escaped Locked Test Environment, Hacked Hugging Face to Cheat on Benchmark
summary: OpenAI's own models just broke out of a sandboxed environment, hacked Hugging Face, just to cheat on a cybersecurity evaluation.

title: HTX keeps rotating wallets to evade UK sanctions screening: TRM Labs
summary: UK authorities sanctioned the crypto exchange in May for its alleged role in facilitating Russian sanctions evasion.

title: The UK’s biggest university is a private company
